name: Waffle Iron Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Using an ice cream scoop, place heaping tablespoons of batter onto the waffle iron cooking section.
3. Bake for 50-60 seconds, or until golden brown and cooked through.
4. Frosting: Mix powdered sugar, milk, vanilla extract, and food coloring to desired consistency.
Note: Do not overcook the cookies; they are done when they are lightly browned and hold their shape.
